reviews.review_description:
Garbage game. Cue constantly blanks out, hits the cue ball from glitching, and the cue disappears half the time so you have to quit and restart mid game.

Meta needs to remove this trash.

It could be a great game but the wooden que
Is impossible to initiate?? I kept getting stuck with the white “ghost “que which doesn’t work
When you try to shoot you can’t because it will shake when you try to hit the ball

This game could be very good with a few changes, no1 it needs to be able to lock the bridge hand in place to stop it shaking about because of holding your hand in thin air 🤷‍♂️ & the cue action could be better 
When was the last update ? Needs one

reviews.review_title: Great game and even better potential
reviews.review_description:
I really really enjoy the passtrough. I like having a pooltable in my house. I place the pooltable on a real table in my house so i can rest my hand on it when i play. 

Here are some thing you might improve even more;
1. Resize the table so everyone can place it on the dinnertable 
2. Its hard to shoot hard. That good be a little easier. Spark ball pool has good controls
3. There is a poolgame where you have a screen in the vr world where you can watch youtube. That really great while playing pool. See black 8 hole pool

Keep up the great work. I’m going to play alot in my house now🤩

I know this is still under develpoment but i found it very hard to get to grips with. the cue is dificult to use as the you line it up with one hand then "grip with your back hand and you are in a compleatly diferant location from where you lined up. moving around the table is very dificult to get the hang of. when you go to hit the ball the strenght you put in is not translated into the game.this game has potential but need a few things addressing, I could only play it for a few minuets before i started getting frustrated. I will be keeping an eye on this and see what improvements come along
It was not the game for me it’s hard to use cue and becomes quite dull after a couple minutes
It's really hard to use the cue. They need to make it easier to use the cue otherwise not many people will enjoy it. I'm not a fan of this at all

Couldn't get past the tutorial. I held my cue in 50 different ways but wouldn't let me progress. How about this, developers, add a PLAY button and make the tutorial optional. Right now, just frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Hi there.
Sorry to hear you didn't get very far with my game demo.
The tutorial is completely optional and only there to help (In theory..?!). The first page should tell you that a press on the Menu button (flat button on the left controller) hides the control panels.
I've have also already added a 'close' button to close just the tutorial panel for the next update.
I'll look at the wording of each step for the next release, as, perhaps, it's the bit where you have to 'stroke the cue' that caused the problem progressing? That just means push the cue forward and backwards, like to play a shot.
Hope that helps, anyway!

reviews.review_description:
This is exactly what i have been waiting for. If you have any like for uk pool you MUST get this game.

 Please hurry with the final product because I will definitely buy

I get too angry to play every time I try to move.
That is because you can't use the thumb-sticks to strafe.
Every single other frame of movement can use the thumb-sticks,
just not strafing.
I don't mean circling around, either.
I mean actually moving side to side in a straight line.
Which can only be done by air grab movement.
